messages.message: Do not nest ternary expressions.
Unexpected nullable string value in conditional. Please handle the nullish/empty cases explicitly.

suggestions.desc: Change condition to check for null/undefined (`value != null`)
Explicitly treat nullish value the same as an empty string (`value ?? ""`)
Explicitly convert value to a boolean (`Boolean(value)`)

messages.message: Unnecessary optional chain on a non-nullish value.

suggestions.desc: Remove unnecessary optional chain

Unexpected nullable string value in conditional. Please handle the nullish/empty cases explicitly.

Explicitly convert value to a boolean (`Boolean(value)`)

messages.message: Async arrow function expected no return value.

Unnecessary conditional, expected left-hand side of `??` operator to be possibly null or undefined.
Arrow function has a complexity of 9. Maximum allowed is 8.
